name: roslyn-mcp
description: A production-usable MCP server providing semantic C# analysis powered by Roslyn. Enables AI coding agents to navigate, analyze, and refactor real C# solutions without requiring Visual Studio.

tools.name: workspace_load
tools.description: Load a .sln, .slnx, or .csproj file into the workspace for semantic analysis

tools.name: symbol_search
tools.description: Search for symbols by name pattern across the loaded workspace

tools.name: find_references
tools.description: Find all references to a symbol across the entire solution

tools.name: go_to_definition
tools.description: Find the definition location of a symbol

tools.name: project_diagnostics
tools.description: Get compiler diagnostics for the workspace

tools.name: build_workspace
tools.description: Run dotnet build for the loaded workspace

tools.name: test_run
tools.description: Run dotnet test for the workspace or a selected project

ROSLYNMCP_RATE_LIMIT_MAX_REQUESTS.description: Maximum tool invocations per sliding window

ROSLYNMCP_RATE_LIMIT_WINDOW_SECONDS.description: Sliding window duration for rate limiting in seconds

ROSLYNMCP_REQUEST_TIMEOUT_SECONDS.description: Per-request timeout for tool invocations in seconds

ROSLYNMCP_PATH_VALIDATION_FAIL_OPEN.description: When true, allow access if MCP roots lookup fails. When false, reject.
